# Legacy Output Fixtures

These files are frozen regression baselines copied from the pre-`outputs/`
layout of `/Users/jdsimon/mermaid/cfneic`.

They are intentionally not active run products. `verify_legacy_outputs`
regenerates fresh workflow outputs under a temporary `outputs/` directory and
compares them against this fixture subset to protect behavior while the run
layout is modernized.

Only files referenced by the regression verifier are kept here.
